data.name: Fever House
data.detailed_description:
A young man from the countryside arrives in a bustling city, driven by the dream of a better future and the desire to experience a life he has never known. Naive but ambitious, he soon discovers that the city is filled with temptation, danger, and complex relationships that will shape his fate.

By an unexpected twist of fate, he becomes involved with two influential women:

  • The Landlady — proud and elegant, with a mysterious past and hidden ambitions that slowly come to light.

  • The Neighbor — warm, charming, and surprisingly perceptive, offering comfort and emotional support when he needs it most.

  • The Neighbor’s Daughter — stubborn, energetic, and fiercely independent, whose bold personality and unpredictable actions challenge him in unexpected ways.

Through a series of choices, chance encounters, and impulsive decisions, the protagonist finds himself bound to both women. Each relationship develops differently based on the player’s actions, leading to affection, conflict, jealousy, or betrayal.

Gameplay Features

  • Story-driven adult visual novel / life simulation

  • Choice-based narrative where decisions directly affect relationships, story branches, and endings

  • Multiple routes and endings, including harmony, domination, betrayal, and unexpected fulfillment

  • Relationship management system: balance affection, trust, desire, and loyalty between characters

  • Interactive dialogue choices that unlock unique scenes and storylines

  • Adult-oriented content (18+), including sexual themes, nudity, and mature relationships

  • Character-driven progression, where the protagonist’s personality and values evolve based on player choices

What to Expect

  • A slow-burn narrative focusing on emotional tension, desire, and power dynamics

  • Meaningful player agency with long-term consequences

  • Fully illustrated scenes and character interactions

  • A mature story about ambition, temptation, and identity in the modern city

As the city reveals its secrets and each woman unveils her true intentions, the player must decide:
Who can be trusted? Who will be loved? And what kind of man will he become?

Your choices define the outcome.

data.short_description: A story-driven adult visual novel where your choices shape relationships, desire, and destiny. Balance love, loyalty, and ambition as a young man navigating life, temptation, and marriage with three very different women in the city.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual Core or higher
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core™ i3-2100 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 (2GB+ of VRAM)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 MB 可用空間
